ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (A)

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-21-2007 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 10/15/07 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 10/3/07 @ 10:30AM IN DEPT. 220. FOLLOW UP SESSIONS OF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 220 ARE SCHEDULED FOR 10/10/07, 10/11/07 AND 10/12/07. PLAINTIFF'S DEMAND IS DUE BY 9/25/07, AND DEFENDANT'S COUNTER DEMAND IS DUE BY 10/1/07. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. PLAINTIFFS DONALD VIS' AND DOLORES VIS' DEPOSITIONS ARE TO BE COMPLETED BY 7/31/07. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 7/20/07, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. DEFENDANTS TO PROVIDE INFORMATION REGARDING PROPOSITION 51 WITNESSES AND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BY 8/10/07. IF DEFENDANTS LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR #4280
